framework.name: Perceived Risk Assessment Model
framework.description: Trust mechanisms should be calibrated based on four factors: (1) user base size (bigger = more bad actors), (2) worst-case scenario severity, (3) transaction value, (4) cultural trust baseline of target users. Small/low-value/local marketplaces need minimal trust infrastructure; large/high-value/global ones need elaborate systems.
framework.raw_quote: to understand what type of trust mechanisms you need you first need to understand the type and size of your users perceived risks
